calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions For Order Confirming Trust Interpretation And Directing The Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stacie Nelson, via ZOOM, for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel if Scott has any issues with the terms of the petition. Counsel reports that Scott does not. The court requests confirmation in open court of any appearances to object to the petition. None are presented.

The Petition for Instructions for Order Confirming Trust Interpretation and Directing the Co-Trustees is submitted with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
